title: × dactylodenia berninaensis
intro: × Dactylodenia berninaensis is a hybrid orchid plant species, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza and Coeloglossum genera. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of × Dactylodenia berninaensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
